query:
INSERT INTO host_listings (
  hostName,
  title,
  cuisineStyle,
  district,
  pricePerPerson,
  profilePhotoUrl,
  foodPhotoUrls,
  bio,
  aboutMe,
  passionBesideFood,
  signatureDishes,
  availability,
  languages,
  experienceType,
  maxGuestCount,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'Vivie',
  'Spicy Southwestern & Northern Chinese Home Cooking',
  'Southwestern & Northern Chinese',
  'Changning',
  560,
  'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/ZGyjnbJIThYnvYiR.jpeg',
  '["https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/wEnIAheExEGvUcuz.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/LJNMrxcavligzhDL.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/MXAHAALrNhAfdUTl.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/PzsOjmyqtuBQVsPp.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/SkkIFeZERsvRignZ.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/vmnwApGEnUFealIp.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/qaDLIhlOVQzidIKS.jpeg","https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/tOOxWBFHRdBesHZI.jpeg"]',
  'Originally from Guizhou, Vivie was taught to cook by her grandmother, learning the perfect synthesis of spices and flavors from her hometown. She moved to Shanghai at eighteen to attend university and has lived here for the past decade with her husband Chris and their two cats Frank and Tim in their comfortable apartment near Xin Hua road.',
  'Vivie was raised by her grandmother who taught her to create authentic Southwestern Chinese dishes. Every day after school, they cooked dinner together for their family. Her family seldom ate at restaurants because the home-cooked meals were so delightful. She now makes and sells her own chili sauce inspired by the famous Lao Gan Ma.',
  'Dancing, karaoke, playing guitar, fitness, and travel. Vivie and Chris routinely trek through historical towns across Greater China and enjoy a good game of beer pong on occasion.',
  '["Spring rolls with Chinese cabbage, pork and mushroom","Peppery chicken soup","Kung pau chicken with peanuts and homemade chili paste","Mapo tofu - Sichuan style tofu in chili paste with minced pork","Stir-fried seasonal vegetables","Homemade rice noodles with minced pork and chili oil","Rice balls in sweet rice wine with osmanthus sugar"]',
  'Weekends only (both lunch and dinner available)',
  'English, Mandarin',
  'both',
  4,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute INSERT INTO host_listings (

  'Originally from Guizhou, Vivie was taught to cook by her grandmother, learning the perfect synthesis of spices and flavors from her hometown. She moved to Shanghai at eighteen to attend university and has lived here for the past decade with her husband Chris and their two cats Frank and Tim in their comfortable apartment near Xin Hua road.',

Her family seldom ate at restaurants because the home-cooked meals were so delightful. She now makes and sells her own chili sauce inspired by the famous Lao Gan Ma.',
  'Dancing, karaoke, playing guitar, fitness, and travel. Vivie and Chris routinely trek through historical towns across Greater China and enjoy a good game of beer pong on occasion.',
  '["Spring rolls with Chinese cabbage, pork and mushroom","Peppery chicken soup","Kung pau chicken with peanuts and homemade chili paste","Mapo tofu - Sichuan style tofu in chili paste with minced pork","Stir-fried seasonal vegetables","Homemade rice noodles with minced pork and chili oil","Rice balls in sweet rice wine with osmanthus sugar"]',
  'Weekends only (both lunch and dinner available)',
  'English, Mandarin',
  'both',
  4,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
